document_id.description: A unique UUID or hash representing the entire document or logical group.

total_pages.description: Total number of pages/fragments belonging to this document container.

is_verified_sequence.description: True if the page order is guaranteed by the source (e.g., native PDF). False if it is a loose scan requiring LLM assembly.

global_summary.description: Optional overall summary of the complete document (populated later if multi-page).

sequence_number.description: The page index. For unsequenced scans, defaults to 1 or an initial guess.

image_file.description: Filename of the processed image asset used for OCR.

markdown_file.description: Filename of the generated markdown output.

anchors.description: Text hooks designed specifically for the downstream LLM to stitch fragments together.

first_line.description: The very first meaningful line of text on this page.

last_line.description: The very last line of text on this page (excellent for finding sentence continuations).

page_footer.description: Detected footer text (e.g., explicit page numbers like 'Page 2 of 5').

content_fingerprint.description: Metadata hints to find relationships between isolated scans.

snippet.description: A 200-character summary or semantic representation of the page content.

detected_entities.description: Extracted key nouns, invoice numbers, or dates that should match across a multi-page document.
